summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NO2 Pollution Map Viewer application. Backend APIs working correctly with 12/13 tests passing. Frontend fully functional with successful login, map interaction, polygon drawing, analysis pipeline execution, and report generation. Socket.IO real-time updates working properly.

minor_bugs.issue: Accepts invalid polygon data without proper validation
minor_bugs.impact: Should return 400/422 for invalid polygon instead of 200

passed_tests: Login with valid credentials (sarvesh_pc / sarvesh_pc@06)
Login with invalid credentials shows error message
Dashboard page loads with map and sidebar
Leaflet map loads with CartoDB tiles
Draw controls are visible and functional
Polygon drawing works correctly
Date picker opens and allows selection
Start Analysis button disabled without polygon
Start Analysis button enabled after polygon creation
Analysis pipeline executes all 4 agents sequentially
Socket.IO real-time updates show agent progress
Generate Report button appears after analysis completion
Report page loads with statistics, trend chart, and recommendations
Theme toggle works on both login and dashboard pages
Logout functionality works correctly
GET /api/auth/me returns user data when authenticated
POST /api/analysis/start creates analysis and returns analysis_id
GET /api/analysis/{id} returns complete analysis data
All 4 agents (data_fetcher, stats_analyzer, trend_analyzer, recommendation_generator) complete successfully
Mock data generation works for GEE and Azure OpenAI
Navigation between pages works correctly
